Based on the evidence presented, Octavia has the strongest motive - Ernest was threatening to expose her illegal past from before she joined the police force, which would have ruined her career. She also had opportunity (patrolling the campgrounds on the night of the murder) and means (experience with crowbars from her construction background). Her defensive behavior during questioning further suggests she has something to hide.

Addison, while having access to crowbars and being present at the party, lacks a clear motive. His nervous behavior could be interpreted as suspicious but is not directly linked to the murder.

Therefore, Octavia is the most likely murderer.
